surface_gap_insights.insight: Provides conservative home wellness framing suitable for safer educational direction.
Provides scientific and physiological framing but includes higher-risk claim language.
Provides practical setup, safety and expectation-management framing.

safe_direction_notes: Require source review before scientific claims.

claim_risk_notes: Mentions post-exercise recovery and near-infrared light reaching deeper beneath the skin; keep as review-only and avoid converting into verified product claims.
No treatment, cure or guaranteed-result claim detected in this answer.

The answer uses higher-risk scientific and physiological claims including photobiomodulation, collagen production, cellular turnover, inflammation, tissue repair, muscle soreness, joint inflammation, circadian rhythms and melatonin production.

The answer states that NIR light is used for reducing inflammation and accelerating physical recovery, which should remain review-only and must not be converted into customer-facing product claims without claim validation and source review.
The answer includes strong benefit language such as biological benefits are cumulative and yields much better results; these should not be reused as verified claims.

The answer mentions muscle recovery, soreness, joint comfort, reduced redness, hair and scalp support, sleep and light-sensitive medications; these should remain review-only and must not be converted into verified product claims without claim validation and source review.
The answer includes safety-related guidance for eye conditions, skin conditions, pregnancy and light-sensitive medications; this should not be reused as medical advice.
The answer is relatively balanced because it says effects can be subtle and research is still evolving.

notes: Content Gap Diagnosis is review-only and must not be treated as final SEO content, customer-facing copy, content opportunity score or visibility score.
